TAPS.entity_name: Transit Authority of the Puget Sound
TAPS.lore_notes: Unified Entity: Merges all 5 real-world regional agencies into one frictionless authority.
TAPS.visual_cues: Distinct liveries remain (e.g., Express routes use blue/teal waves; local King County uses teal/yellow stripes).

WAVE Card.historical_context: During initial development, staff proposed 'Easy-Pass' and 'COMPASS'. General Counsel shot down 'COMPASS' due to PacificLink's trademark in Vancouver, and immediately vetoed 'Easy-Pass' under threat of a Cease & Desist from the East Coast E-ZPass IAG. 'Electronic' was chosen as the legally safe substitute.

AWE.historical_context: Forced to rebrand from AWF (American Wrestling Federation) after The Animal Welfare Fund successfully sued Victor Cross in the English High Court in 2002 for violating a 1994 agreement.
AWE.marketing_notes: Transitioned using the defiant 2002 'We're getting the F out!' campaign.

Wellington's Department Store.lore_notes: Bought out Whitaker's. Gutted the Glenrock Mall location's dining room for a mattress department and bulldozed the rear greenhouse.

E.H. Whitaker & Co..historical_context: Founded by Charles Monroe Whitaker. Spun off a failed venture called 'Monroe's'.

Apex Delivery.lore_notes: A tiny terrestrial delivery division of the massive intergalactic APEX Conglomerate.

Quantum Blue Badge.logistics_notes: Functions as a universal, unlimited-access pass for the entire TAPS network. Employees simply flash the badge for frictionless boarding. Transitioned to smart-chip loading upon the introduction of the WAVE system.

CVTA.lore_notes: Local transit grid in Virginia. Quantum subsidizes these passes for out-of-state deployments (like NAVSTA Norfolk) just as seamlessly as TAPS.

CTS.lore_notes: A unified, bi-state transit authority that combines the real-world networks of Clark County, WA (C-TRAN) and Portland, OR (TriMet) into a single, seamless regional system.

PacificLink.historical_context: The regional transportation network for the Greater Vancouver area. They successfully deployed the 'COMPASS' smart-card system, which is why the TAPS committee had to pivot to WAVE.

Columbia Provincial Transit.historical_context: The broader provincial transit network. Operated the entire region until PacificLink broke off as an independent entity to manage the Greater Vancouver grid.

Pacific Central Terminus.character_notes: The northern hub for ARTS. Jessica arrived here via the ARTS Cascadian route from the TAPS Tukwila Provisional Platform during a major Quantum enterprise deployment.

The Prospector's Keep.visual_cues: A sovereign, 1890s timber-framed alpine fortress built *on top* of Ruby Mountain. Its massive scale and architecture are heavily inspired by the real-world Timberline Lodge.
The Prospector's Keep.lore_notes: A highly fortified, 1890s timber-framed alpine resort operating as a sovereign family fortress in the North Cascades.

Ruby Mountain (Preserved Location).lore_notes: The actual, real-world geological foundation located on State Route 20. It serves as the physical anchor for the Vanguard's territory.

The Highline Lodge.lore_notes: A historic mountain lodge located on Mount Hood. It exists as a completely separate, in-universe entity and has no operational ties to The Prospector's Keep.

Holt Automotive.product_lines: Models: Paladin (Crown Victoria), Rancher Series (F-150), Astra (Fairmont), Sparrow (Pinto).
Holt Automotive.technical_specs: Built on the 'Apex Platform' (Panther). Paint: Starry Night Blue Metallic.

Izumi Bantam.character_notes: Notable vehicle: 1989, Red, manual transmission, aftermarket Circuit Barn AM/FM Cassette deck.

Meridian Airlines.visual_cues: Features 'The Prismatic Corridor' (equivalent to the ORD Neon Tunnel).

Quantum Corporation.lore_notes: Employees are 'Quantineers'. Leadership: William Keswick (Gates) and Bradley Garrison (Ballmer).
Quantum Corporation.visual_cues: Campus features a store with COGS pricing and a microcomputer museum.

Quantum OS XN Service Pack 2.technical_specs: Trustworthy Computing = 'The Ironclad Directive'. Windows Security Center = Quantum Security Center.

Quantum Calculation 95.character_notes: 'Hall of Tortured Souls' Easter egg hidden in the software; ported by Jessica to modern architecture.

Apex Meridian 110L.lore_notes: An outdated, budget-tier consumer laptop utilized prior to the Clarity hardware upgrade.

APEX.visual_cues: Bumper features a booming synth pulse, rising neon city, and lasers etching 'WORLD PREMIER PRESENTATION' with a 'Halo Chord'.

The Cosmic Rebellion.product_lines: Episodes: The Sovereign's Wrath (Empire), Return of the Guardians (Jedi), The Winter Solstice Broadcast.

Galactic Samurai Geckos.character_notes: Antagonist: The Shogun. (Note: The 1990 film battle where The Shogun stomps a Gecko is a severe trauma trigger for Rachel and Michael).

Fractured Prisms.historical_context: Massive synth-heavy 1980s pop-rock duo formed in Williamsport, MD by surviving siblings Rhys and Claire Manning after a 1981 family tragedy.

Neon Horizon.lore_notes: Fictional 1980s pop-rock act. Known for the holiday track 'Last December' and the arena anthem 'Before the Distance' (an exact drop-in replacement for Roxette's 'Listen to Your Heart').

The Stardust Engine.historical_context: Original fictional band. In-universe lore dictates an active presence in the 1980s, including the release of their project 'Electric Color' in 1987.

Brewster Gardens: The Old World.lore_notes: Also known as The Old Country.
Brewster Gardens: The Old World.product_lines: Attractions: The Loch Serpent (Ness Monster), The Iron Aeronaut (Questor), The Shadow Wolf (Big Bad Wolf), The Siege Engine (Battering Ram), The Imperial Rapids (Roman Rapids), The Aquitaine Motorway (Le Mans).

The Iron Gauntlet.lore_notes: January PPV. Features the 30-Man Iron Gauntlet Match.
The Iron Gauntlet.in_universe_rules: Rule: Elimination only occurs when thrown over the top rope and *both feet* touch the floor, allowing for athletic loophole saves.

AWE Icon.historical_context: The corporate branding for the female roster. In 2006, this division is still heavily mired in the misogynistic 'Bra and Panties' tropes of the era.
